frauddetector.eventtype.label.CreatedTim.Docs: Timestamp of when the event type was created.

frauddetector.eventtype.label.Inline.Docs: Indicates whether the resource is defined within this CloudFormation template and impacts the create, update, and delete behavior of the stack. If the value is `true`, CloudFormation will create/update/delete the resource when creating/updating/deleting the stack. If the value is `false`, CloudFormation will validate that the object exists and then use it within the resource without making changes to the object.   For example, when creating `AWS::FraudDetector::EventType` you must define at least two variables. You can set `Inline=true` for these variables and CloudFormation will create/update/delete the variables as part of stack operations. However, if you set `Inline=false`, CloudFormation will associate the variables to your EventType but not execute any changes to the variables.

frauddetector.eventtype.label.LastUpdate.Docs: Timestamp of when the label was last updated.

frauddetector.eventtype.label.Tags.Docs: An array of key-value pairs to apply to this resource.  For more information, see [Tag](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-resource-tags.html).
